# Evidence Bench

> Evidence Bench is a self-hosted workspace for evidence-gated scientific AI
> with confined Python and R, literature retrieval, deterministic validation,
> independent review, and complete provenance.

## Primary links

- [Product overview](https://kstawiski.github.io/evidence-gated-scientific-agent/)
- [Source and quick start](https://github.com/kstawiski/evidence-gated-scientific-agent)
- [Web, REST, and A2A contract](https://github.com/kstawiski/evidence-gated-scientific-agent/blob/main/docs/WEB_AND_A2A.md)
- [Reporting and evidence standard](https://github.com/kstawiski/evidence-gated-scientific-agent/blob/main/docs/REPORTING_STANDARD.md)
- [Threat model](https://github.com/kstawiski/evidence-gated-scientific-agent/blob/main/docs/THREAT_MODEL.md)
- [Deployment guide](https://github.com/kstawiski/evidence-gated-scientific-agent/blob/main/deploy/README.md)

Evidence Bench produces exploratory scientific reports. It does not claim peer
review, clinical authority, science lock, or submission readiness.
